Adalberto Carrasquilla.note: Carrasquilla is Panama's midfield escape valve, able to carry through pressure and find the next runner.
Adalberto Carrasquilla.noteZh: 卡拉斯基利亚是巴拿马中场摆脱阀，能带球穿过压力并找到下一名跑动者。

Alberto Quintero.note: Quintero gives Panama veteran width, useful when the match needs a direct carry and early service.
Alberto Quintero.noteZh: 金特罗给巴拿马带来老将边路宽度，当比赛需要直接带球和早传时很有用。

Andres Andrade.note: Andrade gives Panama a composed centre-back who can defend the box and start attacks cleanly.
Andres Andrade.noteZh: 安德拉德给巴拿马带来冷静中卫，能防守禁区，也能干净发起进攻。

Anibal Godoy.note: Godoy is Panama's midfield organizer, trusted to slow the game and win contact in central areas.
Anibal Godoy.noteZh: 戈多伊是巴拿马中场组织者，可信赖地放慢比赛并赢下中路身体对抗。

Azarias Londono.note: Londoño gives Panama a mobile forward option, useful for pressing and running beyond the first line.
Azarias Londono.noteZh: 隆多尼奥给巴拿马带来机动前锋选择，适合压迫并冲到第一道防线身后。

Carlos Harvey.note: Harvey gives Panama size in midfield, helping them protect counters and compete for second balls.
Carlos Harvey.noteZh: 哈维给巴拿马中场带来身材，帮助保护反击并争抢第二落点。

Cecilio Waterman.note: Waterman is a physical striker option, useful when Panama want crosses and knockdowns to stick.
Cecilio Waterman.noteZh: 沃特曼是身体型前锋选择，当巴拿马希望传中和摆渡能站住时很有用。

Cesar Blackman.note: Blackman gives Panama pace from right-back, stretching the flank and recovering quickly behind it.
Cesar Blackman.noteZh: 布莱克曼给巴拿马右后卫位置带来速度，能拉开边路并迅速回追身后。

Cesar Samudio.note: Samudio gives Panama a reaction goalkeeper, useful when the back line faces close-range chances.
Cesar Samudio.noteZh: 萨穆迪奥给巴拿马带来反应型门将，当防线面对近距离机会时很有用。

Cesar Yanis.note: Yanis adds transition speed on the left, dangerous when he can drive to the line and cut service back.
Cesar Yanis.noteZh: 亚尼斯增加左路转换速度，能冲到底线并倒三角传球时很危险。

Cristian Martinez.note: Martínez gives Panama a tidy midfield shield, keeping passes simple after he wins contact.
Cristian Martinez.noteZh: 马丁内斯给巴拿马整洁的中场屏障，赢下对抗后能简洁处理传球。

Edgar Yoel Barcenas.note: Bárcenas gives Panama invention from wide areas, especially on restarts and inside touches.
Edgar Yoel Barcenas.noteZh: 巴尔塞纳斯给巴拿马边路创造力，尤其体现在定位球和内收触球。

Edgardo Farina.note: Fariña gives Panama a mobile centre-back, useful when the defensive line has to cover space.
Edgardo Farina.noteZh: 法里尼亚给巴拿马带来机动中卫，当防线需要覆盖空间时很有用。

Eric Davis.note: Davis gives Panama left-side experience and set-piece quality, a steady outlet under pressure.
Eric Davis.noteZh: 戴维斯给巴拿马左侧经验和定位球质量，是压力下稳定的出球点。

Fidel Escobar.note: Escobar is Panama's defensive organizer, able to clear danger and hit the first forward pass.
Fidel Escobar.noteZh: 埃斯科巴是巴拿马防守组织者，能清理危险并送出第一脚向前传球。

Ismael Diaz.note: Díaz gives Panama sharp movement near goal, especially when he can slip between centre-backs.
Ismael Diaz.noteZh: 迪亚斯给巴拿马门前敏锐跑动，尤其能钻进两名中卫之间时很危险。

Jiovany Ramos.note: Ramos gives Panama another centre-back body for aerial spells and late defensive pressure.
Jiovany Ramos.noteZh: 拉莫斯给巴拿马增加中卫厚度，适合空中球阶段和比赛末段防守压力。

Jorge Gutierrez.note: Gutiérrez adds goalkeeper depth, useful for reaction saves and managing repeated crosses.
Jorge Gutierrez.noteZh: 古铁雷斯增加门将深度，适合反应扑救和处理连续传中。

Jose Cordoba.note: Córdoba gives Panama speed at centre-back, important when they defend space behind the line.
Jose Cordoba.noteZh: 科尔多瓦给巴拿马中卫位置带来速度，对防守身后空间很重要。

Jose Fajardo.note: Fajardo is a direct striker option, attacking channels and giving Panama a target for early balls.
Jose Fajardo.noteZh: 法哈多是直接前锋选择，冲击通道，并给巴拿马早传提供目标。

Jose Luis Rodriguez.note: Rodríguez gives Panama speed on the break, especially when he can attack the outside shoulder.
Jose Luis Rodriguez.noteZh: 罗德里格斯给巴拿马反击速度，尤其能冲击外侧肩膀时很有威胁。

Luis Mejia.note: Mejía brings goalkeeper experience, steady when Panama need calm through pressure.
Luis Mejia.noteZh: 梅希亚带来门将经验，当巴拿马需要在压力中保持冷静时很稳定。

Michael Murillo.note: Murillo is Panama's powerful right-back, dangerous when his overlaps become box arrivals.
Michael Murillo.noteZh: 穆里略是巴拿马强力右后卫，当套边变成禁区到位时很危险。

Orlando Mosquera.note: Mosquera gives Panama reach in goal, useful when opponents start shooting through traffic.
Orlando Mosquera.noteZh: 莫斯克拉给巴拿马门前覆盖范围，当对手在人群中射门时很有用。

Roderick Miller.note: Miller gives Panama defensive strength, especially for aerial duels and set-piece marking.
Roderick Miller.noteZh: 米勒给巴拿马防守强度，尤其适合空中对抗和定位球盯防。

Tomas Rodriguez.note: Rodríguez gives Panama forward depth, useful when the press needs fresh legs near the box.
Tomas Rodriguez.noteZh: 托马斯·罗德里格斯给巴拿马前锋深度，当禁区附近压迫需要新鲜跑动时很有用。
